title: Key Sun Laboratories Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: The TGA's own recall record, corroborated by independent pharmacy trade-press reporting with matching batch numbers, describes a recall of four batches of Key Sun children's cough/cold lozenges after a small metal wire was found embedded in a lozenge, with the TGA citing choking, laceration and digestive-tract injury risk to children.
scope: Subject of a TGA-recorded product recall over a physical contamination hazard (embedded metal wire); TGA cited choking, laceration and digestive-tract injury risk specifically to children; Four affected batch numbers identified in the recall record
